cdstestcases:testCase.cdstestcases:title: Test cast(tcurc.altwr as altwr_cds)
cdstestcases:testCase.cdstestcases:description: Test result of CAST expression : cast(tcurc.altwr as altwr_cds) in the CDS View.

cdstestcases:testCase.cdstestcases:title: Test cast(tcurc.isocd as isocd_cds)
cdstestcases:testCase.cdstestcases:description: Test result of CAST expression : cast(tcurc.isocd as isocd_cds) in the CDS View.

cdstestcases:testCase.cdstestcases:title: When tcurc.waers NOT EQUALS tcurx.currkey in LEFT OUTER JOIN
cdstestcases:testCase.cdstestcases:description: Test a CDS View when only one JOIN condition is not satisfied i.e. When tcurc.waers NOT EQUALS tcurx.currkey in LEFT OUTER JOIN and all other JOIN conditions are satisfied.

cdstestcases:testCase.cdstestcases:title: When tcurc.waers EQUALS tcurx.currkey in LEFT OUTER JOIN
cdstestcases:testCase.cdstestcases:description: Test a CDS View when only one JOIN condition is satisfied i.e. When tcurc.waers EQUALS tcurx.currkey in LEFT OUTER JOIN and all other JOIN conditions are not satisfied.

cdstestcases:testCase.cdstestcases:title: When all JOIN conditions are met
cdstestcases:testCase.cdstestcases:description: Test CDS View when all JOIN conditions in the CDS View are satisfied.
